title: Fluorescent Pocket
lore: Justin Tiger locked a funk pocket to the flicker rate of platform fluorescents — tiger stripes optional, head-nod mandatory.
artistPersona: Jazztronica and funky commute music — pop hooks so sticky the turnstile beeps in harmony. Still instrumental; no celebrity faces.
albumConcept: Justin Tiger's overnight metro sketches — tiger stripes under fluorescent platforms, hooks that dissolve into platform reverb.
